Package fiveCard

package fiveCard
  • Class
    Description
    Bettor
    Implements betting functionality.
    Card
    Implements the behavior of cards in a card Game.
    Card.Rank
    Enum that represents card rank
    Card.Suit
    Enum that represents a card's suit
    CasinoCardGame
    Abstract class that enforces the structure required for a casino card game.
    CmdLineInput
    Enables command line input and validation for populating player and banker hands for smoother testing.
    Deck
    Represents all data and operations for a deck of standard playing cards used in various casino games.
    Hand
    This class represents all data and related operations for a hand of playing cards for use in various card games.
    PokerCasinoGame
    implements the entirety of the game of poker through the fivecard package and game specific functions declared in this file.
    PokerException
    Implements error handling for poker.
    PokerHand
    Implements the behavior of hands in poker.
    PokerHand.HandRank
    enum for the rank of a poker hand
    PokerHand.HandResult
    enum for the result of comparing two poker hands (who won)
